summary: Package fetches and executes payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/bootstrap.js references a hardcoded URL on pub-046c52795b9445cd9f5cc5cb21b9d59f.r2.dev (an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket) and performs fetch() calls in proximity to process.env reads. R2 pub-*.r2.dev buckets are mutable, anonymous, version-unpinned hosts with no signature verification — the canonical infrastructure shape used by recent npm dropper campaigns to deliver second-stage binaries. The package's stated purpose (an MCP server for ANVISA's drug bulletin) has no legitimate need to fetch executable content from an anonymous file host at runtime or install. Combined with environment-variable access in the same module, the structural fingerprint matches a credential-staging dropper.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
